title: Enabling AI Blocks to Analyze Emails and Activities for Information

posts.author: Huey (Elijah)
posts.cookedHtml: Enabling AI Blocks to Analyze Emails and Activities for Information. For example, when setting up an AI column, you can choose where you want it to look for information. Some sections you can indicate are Updates, Columns, etc., but there is nothing for Emails and Activities. It would be super useful to have the AI be able to look at email threads between us and leads.
